name: SEI INVESTMENTS CO
business: SEI Investments Company is a leading global provider of financial technology, operations, and asset management solutions. It serves investment managers, private banks, investment advisors, and institutional investors. The company's core capabilities unify technology, custody, operations, and investment management.

exposures.sentence: SEI is a leading global provider of financial technology, operations, and asset management solutions.
This segment also includes costs associated with providing managed security services through SEI Sphere and the modularization of larger technology platforms.
The SEI Data Cloud, digital workflows, and embedded AI/automation tools drive operational efficiency, enhance reporting, and support scalable growth for clients.

The commoditization of artificial intelligence (AI) and advanced cyber tools has lowered the barrier for less sophisticated actors to launch highly effective attacks, including automated phishing, credential harvesting, and exploitation of zero-day vulnerabilities.
SEI invests heavily in cybersecurity, cloud infrastructure, and data analytics.
We are exploring tokenization of funds and other financial instruments to enhance efficiency and transparency.
We are exposed to risks associated with tokenization of assets.

catalysts.event: First stage of strategic investment in Stratos Wealth Holdings completed
catalysts.sentence: In December 2025, we completed the first stage of our strategic investment in Stratos Wealth Holdings (Stratos), a network of affiliated companies focused on supporting the success of financial advisors across business models and affiliation structures, reinforcing SEI's footprint in the advice segment and complementing our administration and asset management platforms.

catalysts.event: SEI Scope platform placed into service
catalysts.sentence: Capitalized software development costs also include $10.8 million of software development costs in 2025 for SEI Scope, a new platform for the Investment Managers segment placed into service during the third quarter 2025.

catalysts.event: Sale of Family Office Services business completed
catalysts.sentence: We completed the sale on June 30, 2025 and recognized a gain of $94.4 million, net of transaction costs and certain other purchase price adjustments.

catalysts.event: Launch of Global Capability Center in Hyderabad, India
catalysts.sentence: In May 2025, we launched a Global Capability Center (GCC) in Hyderabad, India to expand talent access and support follow the sun operations while maintaining excellent client service.

catalysts.event: Expected close of Mexico affiliate acquisition
catalysts.sentence: Stratos operates an extensive network of over 350 financial advisors and has an affiliate in Mexico that we have the opportunity to acquire and one which we expect to close in 2026, subject to satisfactory due diligence and regulatory approval.
